observation/exterior_image_1_left.comment: DROID exterior camera (over_shoulder_left). Third-person scene view; first by camera-order convention (maps to the policy's primary/exterior slot). Native 720x1280, aspect-preserving downscaled (long edge capped at 640) by the bridge — NO square squash, so the policy's resize_with_pad to 224 stays distortion-free. Shape is advisory (the agent reads the real array shape); dtype 'image' is the runtime sentinel; the wire payload is uint8 HWC RGB.

observation/wrist_image_left.comment: DROID wrist camera (Robotiq base_link/wrist_cam, focal 2.8 — calibrated to pi05/DreamZero). Native 720x1280, aspect-preserving downscaled (long edge capped at 640) by the bridge — NO square squash; the policy resize_with_pads to 224. Shape is advisory; wire payload is uint8 HWC RGB.

observation/state.comment: Joint-space proprio (RoboLab ProprioceptionObservationCfg arm_joint_pos + gripper_pos): elems 0-6 are 7 Panda arm joints (REAL rad), elem 7 is the gripper opening (state_representation NORM01: 0=open, 1=closed, dimensionless). All JOINT_ABS_POS, so kept as one runtime feature; the per-quantity split (arm REAL vs gripper NORM01) is spelled out in demos/contracts/envs/droid.json. Normalization is policy-side (null).

action.comment: RoboLab default DroidJointPositionActionCfg (native): elems 0-6 are 7 absolute Panda joint position targets (REAL rad, Franka limits), elem 7 is the binary gripper (state_representation BINARY/NORM01: >0.5 closes -> finger_joint pi/4, else opens -> 0). ABSOLUTE (arm and gripper). This is the branch the DROID pi0.5 joint-position policy pairs with (openpi pi05_droid_jointpos / lerobot port DAVIAN-Robotics/pi05_droid_jointpos): the model emits 7 joint deltas + abs gripper, the agent adds the query-time joints (AbsoluteActions) and binarizes the gripper before sending. Selected by --control joint_pos (the default).

comment: RoboLab (NVIDIA Isaac Lab) DROID embodiment: Franka Panda (7-DoF, arm7g1) + Robotiq 2F-85, ~15 Hz (sim dt 1/120, decimation 8), native joint-position control (DroidJointPositionActionCfg). Runtime contract: same structure as the libero/simpler wire contracts (single concatenated 'state', images keyed by the dtype 'image' sentinel), enriched with the spec_v0 semantic layer (state_type / state_representation / frame / order / units / limits). The fully feature-split, dtype-faithful spec artifact for matching lives in demos/contracts/envs/robolab.json. mean/std null: normalization is policy-side. One complete contract per control mode (spec_v0 §5): --control joint_pos (the default) selects this file; siblings: robolab_ee_abs.json, robolab_ee_del.json.
